mapper.select: SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_name AS partnerName, business_number AS businessNumber, contact_name AS contactName, contact_phone AS contactPhone, status AS status, commission_rate AS commissionRate, reject_reason AS rejectReason, contractfile_url AS contractFileUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM partner ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_name AS partnerName FROM partner WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY partner_name ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE partner
status = #{status},
commission_rate = #{commissionRate},
reject_reason = #{rejectReason},
updated_at = SYSDATE
WHERE partner_id = #{partnerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO partner ( partner_name, business_number, contact_name, contact_phone, status, commission_rate, created_at ) VALUES ( #{partnerName}, #{businessNumber}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, 'PENDING', #{commissionRate}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS "docId", origin_file_name AS "docName", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "uploadDate", file_url AS "url" FROM partner_file WHERE partner_id = #{applyId} ORDER BY file_id ASC
